leads.notes: Relocation service in Spanish, French, English. Rental property search + admin support.

leads.notes: Expat rental assistance + buyer's agent services. Legal coordination, negotiation.

leads.notes: NIE, visa, residency, housing, schooling, assistance. Broad scope — good cross-link partner.

leads.name: Locallista (English-Speaking Real Estate Agents directory)
leads.notes: Directory of English-speaking real estate agents in Madrid. Possible content cross-promo.

leads.notes: Major English-language expat portal for Spain. Real estate directory + many other verticals.

leads.name: American Women's Club of Madrid
leads.notes: Promoted to full record awc-madrid on 2026-07-22. Strong cross-promo partner for events.

leads.name: International Newcomers Club of Madrid (INC)
leads.notes: Non-profit social org for newcomers. Mixed-gender. Could be a complementary partner to AWC.

leads.name: American Club of Madrid (ACM)
leads.notes: Mixed-gender professional networking club. 'Go-to organization for the international professional living in Madrid.'

leads.name: Devour Madrid Food Tours
leads.notes: Promoted to full record devour-madrid-food-tours on 2026-07-22. Affiliate booking program likely.

leads.name: SANDEMANs New Europe Madrid (Free Walking Tour)
leads.notes: Free + paid walking tours. Daily English tours. Major brand.

leads.name: Viator Madrid Excursions
leads.notes: Aggregator — affiliate program exists. Could be a default booking link from tour pages.

leads.name: Instituto Franklin - Universidad de Alcalá (UAH)
leads.notes: Teach & Learn in Spain program — places native English speakers in Madrid schools for €1,000/mo + master's degree. MAJOR partnership opportunity for TEFL readers.

leads.name: British Council Madrid
leads.notes: Official UK cultural institute. English courses, exams, cultural events. Multiple Madrid locations.

leads.name: FOROCIO
leads.notes: Promoted to full record forocio-study-abroad on 2026-07-22. Frank is the contact.

leads.name: Accent Global Learning (Madrid Study Center)
leads.notes: Promoted to full record accent-global-madrid on 2026-07-22.

leads.name: TtMadrid
leads.notes: Level 5 TEFL, 20+ years. Paid teaching practice. Should be added to teacher-training-madrid record.

leads.name: TEFL Madrid
leads.notes: Guaranteed TEFL jobs in Spain. Practical program.

leads.name: Canterbury TEFL
leads.notes: 4-week intensive, 80 hours classroom. Madrid-based.

leads.name: Spain TEFL Academy
leads.notes: 120-hour TEFL certificate, 6 teaching practices. €1,375.

leads.name: Teaching House Madrid (CELTA)
leads.notes: CELTA certification (more prestigious than TEFL). 2026 course dates posted.

leads.name: TEFL Heaven
leads.notes: 1-year student visa + paid placement for non-EU citizens. Niche but valuable for US/UK passport holders post-Brexit.

leads.name: Universidad Nebrija
leads.notes: 100% English Master's in Bilingual Education. Strongest English-taught postgraduate option in Madrid.

leads.name: Universidad Carlos III de Madrid (UC3M)
leads.notes: Most English-taught/bilingual undergraduate degrees in Madrid. 21+ bilingual programs.

leads.name: Universidad Rey Juan Carlos (URJC)
leads.notes: Master's in Bilingual Primary Education & English Immersion.

leads.name: Universidad Pontificia Comillas
leads.notes: Specialist Degree in Bilingual Teaching. ICADE (business) and ICAI (engineering) faculties have English tracks.

leads.name: IE University
leads.notes: Fully English undergraduate programs. Already mentioned in universities-madrid — should add structured section there.

leads.name: BLC Spain
leads.notes: English-taught business programs. Smaller institution, personalized approach.

leads.name: Madrid Expats Group (Facebook)
leads.notes: Largest English-language Madrid expat Facebook group. Regular posting opportunities.

leads.name: Brits in Madrid (Facebook)
leads.notes: Smaller, focused group for British expats. Post-Brexit audience.

leads.name: American Expats in Spain (Facebook)
leads.notes: Spain-wide but heavy Madrid presence. Good for visa/NIE content amplification.

leads.name: Expats in Madrid (Facebook)
leads.notes: Networking-focused group. Events, activities, parties.

leads.name: American in Madrid (Facebook)
leads.notes: Older, smaller group focused on practical advice (sightseeing, restaurants, tapas, Spanish classes).

leads.name: Platinum Legal Spain
leads.notes: Expat-focused legal and immigration practice. Visas, property, tax, wills, inheritance, business. Referenced in english-speaking-lawyers-madrid record.

leads.notes: Independent firm. Fast-Track option includes Notary and Apostille fees. Referenced in english-speaking-lawyers-madrid record.

leads.name: Pérez Legal Group
leads.notes: English-speaking lawyers with offices across Spain. 20+ years expat services. Referenced in english-speaking-lawyers-madrid record.

leads.name: Power Abogados
leads.notes: Bilingual Spanish & US nationality lawyers. Madrid. 20+ years. Referenced in english-speaking-lawyers-madrid record.

leads.name: Spain Lawyer
leads.notes: Online provider of legal services for English speakers. 807 505 207 hotline. Referenced in english-speaking-lawyers-madrid record.

leads.name: Ilustre Colegio de Abogados de Madrid (ICAM)

leads.name: It's Complicated (Therapist Directory)
leads.notes: Therapist directory with Madrid location and language filters. Referenced in english-speaking-therapists-madrid record.

leads.name: AmCham Spain (American Chamber of Commerce in Spain)

leads.name: British Chamber of Commerce in Spain
leads.notes: Madrid office: +34 91 576 33 28. UK-Spain trade focus. Post-Brexit relevance. Referenced in international-chambers-madrid record.

leads.notes: Award-winning English-speaking personal training team in Madrid. Referenced in gyms-fitness-madrid sections.

leads.name: EasyFit Madrid
leads.notes: English-speaking personal trainers. Referenced in gyms-fitness-madrid sections.

leads.name: Empawer Fitness
leads.notes: Personal training in Madrid center. Referenced in gyms-fitness-madrid sections.

leads.name: Madrid International Church
leads.notes: Referenced in churches-religion-madrid record. Should verify URL.

leads.name: AAH Veterinary Services
leads.notes: Avenida de Europa 4. Serving English-speaking Madrid for 25+ years. Vet care, house calls, grooming, boarding. Referenced in english-speaking-vets-madrid record. Need to find proper website (not Yelp).

leads.name: Barvet
leads.notes: Full CEXGAN service in English. WhatsApp +34 635 72 30 22. Used as official_url for english-speaking-vets-madrid record.

leads.name: Centro Veterinario Rican
leads.notes: Prosperidad neighborhood (Chamberí). Run by brothers Carlos and Ricardo. Referenced in english-speaking-vets-madrid record.

leads.name: The Village Kids (International Summer Camp)
leads.notes: Ages 8-12. English-language international camp. Two-week sessions. Referenced in english-summer-camps-madrid record.

leads.name: LAE Kids Spanish Summer Camp
leads.notes: Madrid-based. Small groups. Spanish focus with English-speaking staff. Referenced in english-summer-camps-madrid record.

leads.name: Don Quijote Summer Camps
leads.notes: Language camps (Spanish or English) across Spain. Referenced in english-summer-camps-madrid record.

leads.notes: Directory of English-speaking services in Madrid. Could be a competitor OR a partnership opportunity.

leads.notes: Curated list of English-speaking personal trainers in Madrid. Already discovered in Mining Pass 1.

leads.notes: Family-focused expat resource for Madrid. Useful for cross-linking with summer camps and bilingual schools.

leads.name: don Quijote Madrid (Spanish Language School)
leads.notes: Major Spanish language school chain. Madrid location. Part of same group as Enforex.

leads.notes: Promoted via work-exchange-spain record on 2026-07-22. 200+ organic farms in Spain.

leads.notes: Competitor to Workaway. Smaller Spain network but more vetted hosts. Referenced in work-exchange-spain record.

leads.notes: Promoted to full record soccer-camps-madrid on 2026-07-22. Official Real Madrid camp.

leads.notes: Promoted via soccer-camps-madrid record on 2026-07-22. Official Atlético de Madrid camp.
